generated_oml:
instance InternalTemperatureSensor1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 temperature sensor inside styrofoam box (accuracy ±0.5°C from -10 to +85°C)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmission
]

instance InternalTemperatureSensor2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 temperature sensor inside styrofoam box (accuracy ±0.5°C from -10 to +85°C)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmission
]

instance ExternalTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 temperature sensor outside styrofoam box (accuracy ±0.5°C from -10 to +85°C)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmission
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InternalTemperatureSensor1, InternalTemperatureSensor2, ExternalTemperatureSensor
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature measurements from DS18S20 sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyEnabler, PythonEnabler
]

instance ModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "2-parameter thermal model for temperature dynamics prediction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonEnabler
]

instance ModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "4-parameter thermal model for temperature dynamics prediction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonEnabler
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "214×214×3 mm heatbed controlled via MOSFETs for 4A current"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "12V/24V fan with 0.02 m³/s airflow"
]

instance ControlPCB : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for signal isolation between Raspberry Pi GPIO and high-current actuators"
]

instance RaspberryPiController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller handling sensor data acquisition and actuator control"
]

instance IncubatorSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Thermal incubator system with styrofoam insulated box (0.03 m³ air volume)"
    base:contains Heatbed, Fan, ControlPCB, InternalTemperatureSensor1, InternalTemperatureSensor2, ExternalTemperatureSensor, RaspberryPiController
]

instance RabbitMQEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for transmitting sensor data between physical and virtual components"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance RaspberryPiEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller handling sensor data acquisition and actuator control"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, SensorCommunicationService
]

instance ScipyEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy non-linear least squares optimization for model calibration"
    DTDFVocab:enables ParameterCalibrationService
]

instance PythonEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python runtime environment for executing digital twin components"
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperaturePredictionService, FaultDetectionService, StateEstimationService
]

instance GitHubRepositoryEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "GitHub open-source code repository for digital twin implementation"
    DTDFVocab:enables CodeRepositoryService
]

instance OneWireProtocolEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "1-Wire bus protocol for communication with DS18S20 sensors"
    DTDFVocab:enables SensorCommunicationService
]

instance TemperaturePredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predicts temperature dynamics using calibrated thermal models (Model A/B) for incubator control"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperaturePredictionInsight, AdjustHeatingDurationAction
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Monitors real-time temperature data for safety and optimal operation"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyMonitoringInsight, SafetyCorrectiveAction
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Detects faults in thermal system components based on sensor data deviations"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Estimates internal states of the thermal system using sensor measurements"
    DTDFVocab:provides StateEstimationInsight
]

instance ParameterCalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Calibrates thermal model parameters using Scipy optimization on sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides CalibrationResultInsight
]

instance CodeRepositoryService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Manages digital twin code repository using GitHub"
    DTDFVocab:provides CodeVersioningInsight
]

instance SensorCommunicationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Handles communication with DS18S20 sensors via 1-Wire protocol"
    DTDFVocab:provides SensorDataAcquisitionInsight
]

instance TemperaturePredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted temperature trajectory for decision-making"
]

instance SafetyMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Safety status monitoring results for corrective actions"
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected anomalies indicating component failure"
]

instance StateEstimationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimated internal states of the thermal system"
]

instance CalibrationResultInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calibrated thermal model parameters from optimization"
]

instance CodeVersioningInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Code repository version control information"
]

instance SensorDataAcquisitionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Sensor data acquisition status via 1-Wire protocol"
]

instance AdjustHeatingDurationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjusts heating duration based on temperature predictions"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SafetyCorrectiveAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Triggers corrective actions for safety violations"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands (e.g., heatbed on/off, fan speed) are transmitted from Digital Twin to Raspberry Pi controller via RabbitMQ messages, executed by low-level driver with safe protocol enforcement."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ server for communication orchestration, low-level driver for hardware interaction, controller implementing bang-bang logic, and two thermal models for simulation; all components interacting via RabbitMQ message exchanges."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase (as operated), as the Digital Twin integrates models and data from the deployed physical incubator system."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Assumptions validated via experiments (e.g., temperature uniformity tested with multiple sensors), model calibration minimizing residual error using non-linear least squares, Model B showing better thermal inertia prediction fidelity."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ protocol for message-based communication between Physical Twin components and Digital Twin services, with RabbitMQ server hosted on Raspberry Pi."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B hosting RabbitMQ server, controller software, low-level driver, and Digital Twin models."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safe protocol in low-level driver to maintain device safety, control limits (LL/UL) in bang-bang controller to prevent overheating, and MOSFETs for current isolation ensuring safe actuation."
]
